coreTruthSet.description: Meaning extraction begins with listening (tone, spacing, breath) prior to visual confirmation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She listened first. Before she looked. ... Tone. Spacing. Breath. That was where meaning lived.

coreTruthSet.description: Fire configuration is intentionally low-signature (coal-heavy, low-flame) to minimize distant visibility while preserving close-range utility.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The fire was not meant to be seen from far away ... more coal than flame, more glow than brightness.

coreTruthSet.description: Observer intelligence depends on deliberate body-position and silhouette control to gather signal without drawing notice.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She had chosen this place carefully ... not forward ... forward would break her outline.

coreTruthSet.description: Authority is legible before speech through interruption suppression and group behavioral accommodation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: The woman did not speak immediately ... she controlled the space ... no one interrupted her.

coreTruthSet.description: Under constrained light, movement-pattern reading substitutes for facial interpretation and remains decision-relevant.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Faces were harder ... But she did not need faces. She watched movement.

settingAnchors.name: Low-Signature Forest Clearing
settingAnchors.description: Depressed fire pit council edge where acoustic containment, light discipline, and silhouette management shape conflict observation.

continuityConstraints.title: Signature Management Protocol
continuityConstraints.text: Councils under risk use heat/light/acoustic controls to reduce detectability while retaining enough signal for internal coordination.

continuityConstraints.title: Edge Observer Intelligence Discipline
continuityConstraints.text: Edge-position observers prioritize auditory and kinetic cues, preserving concealment while extracting high-value relational signals.

continuityConstraints.title: Preverbal Power Recognition
continuityConstraints.text: Power enters the scene before speech through interruption patterns, body stillness, and collective self-limitation.

openResearchGaps.title: What material and procedural standards define low-signature council setup across terrain types?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to keep stealth gathering scenes operationally consistent.

openResearchGaps.title: When is edge observation tolerated versus sanctioned in sensitive gatherings?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to govern watcher participation realism and risk consequences.

openResearchGaps.title: Which nonverbal cues most reliably indicate authority before speech in this system?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for consistent power-legibility writing under low-visibility conditions.
